raw_consumer_statement:
We never recieved a 12 months XXXX XXXX  that was purchased on XX/XX/year> for {$290.00}. We filed a complaint with the merchant and the credit card company ( Citi ) immediatly after learning we were defrauded ( same day ). 

We've continued after many months and correpsondences, phone calls, emails showing proof, etc. with the credit card company ( the merchant 's phone # is disconnected/no longer in service ), to no avail. 

The credit card company ( Citi ) has sided with the fraudster company, PogoPass, and has refused to refund us our money ( credit ), even though WE NEVER RECIEVED ANY OF THE PROMISED GOODS OR SERVICES ADVERTISED!
